channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Spektrum Analitika, 11–23 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
4 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Spektrum Analitika, 11–23 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/montenegrin_ep_polls/2026-04-23-SpektrumAnalitika.html
